PAGX
Portable Animated Graphics XML
Readable
Plain-text XML, easy to diff, debug, and AI-generate.
Comprehensive
Covers vectors, images, text, effects, and masks.
Expressive
Compact structure for both static and animated content.
Interoperable
Bridges AE, Figma, SVG, PDF, and more seamlessly.
Deployable
One-click export to binary PAG with high performance.
.pagx
.pag
Production
Design - Develop - Deploy
